description.en: Chinook pushed game AI from competitive play toward mathematical solution. The University of Alberta team combined opening books, deep alpha-beta search, expert evaluation, and enormous endgame databases, eventually proving that perfect play in checkers leads to a draw.
description.zh: Chinook 把游戏 AI 从竞技对弈推进到数学求解。阿尔伯塔大学团队结合开局库、深层 alpha-beta 搜索、专家评估和庞大残局数据库，最终证明跳棋在完美对弈下结果为和棋。

html.en: Checkers was complex enough to challenge search algorithms but structured enough for decades of endgame database construction.
html.zh: 跳棋足够复杂，可以挑战搜索算法；同时结构足够明确，适合长期构建残局数据库。

html.en: Chinook paired forward search with solved endgame tables, letting the program connect current choices to proven late-game outcomes.
html.zh: Chinook 将前向搜索与已求解残局表结合，使程序能把当前选择连接到被证明的终局结果。

html.en: Experts generally treat Chinook as a landmark in game-solving research and high-performance search. Its long-term legacy is showing how expert evaluation, alpha-beta search, opening knowledge, and endgame databases can combine to approach perfect play.
html.zh: 专家通常把 Chinook 视为游戏求解研究和高性能搜索的里程碑。它的长期影响在于展示专家评估、alpha-beta 搜索、开局知识和残局数据库如何结合并逼近完美对弈。

method.zh: alpha-beta 搜索加残局数据库

material.en: University of Alberta Chinook pages and Science paper
material.zh: 阿尔伯塔大学 Chinook 页面与 《科学》 论文

demo.en: Connect a move to a solved endgame table
demo.zh: 把一步棋连接到已求解残局表

text.en: Human and computer game knowledge narrows early choices.
text.zh: 人类与计算机棋谱知识缩小早期选择。

text.en: Late positions are precomputed to proven outcomes.
text.zh: 后期局面被预计算为可证明结果。

text.en: The game-theoretic value is known from the starting position.
text.zh: 从初始局面可知游戏理论值。

relatedAchievements.zh: 斯特雷奇 跳棋程序

description.en: Science record for the weak solution of checkers and Chinook's endgame database work.
description.zh: 《科学》 记录：跳棋弱求解与 Chinook 残局数据库工作。
